About Us

Trusted Roadside
Assistance Partner
in UAE

At Oncall Roadside Assistance, we understand that vehicle breakdowns can happen anytime—and often when you least expect them. That's why we provide 24/7 roadside assistance services across the UAE, ensuring you're never left stranded.

Our team of certified and experienced technicians is equipped to handle everything from battery replacement and flat tire repair to fuel delivery and minor mechanical fixes.

What We Do

Our Roadside Assistance
Services in UAE

From dead batteries to full vehicle recovery—we handle every roadside emergency quickly and professionally.

Battery Replacement

Fast on-site battery supply and installation for all vehicle types across UAE.

Flat Tire Assistance

Quick on-site puncture repair or spare tire installation anywhere in UAE.

Emergency Fuel Delivery

Petrol or diesel delivered directly to your location, 24 hours a day.

Mobile Oil Change

Professional car maintenance and oil change at your location — no garage needed.

System Diagnosis & Repairs

Expert mobile mechanic for minor repairs, electrical fixes, and full diagnostics.

AC Gas Refill

On-demand AC gas refill service. Stay cool with fast, efficient car AC servicing.

Towing & Recovery

Reliable car towing for breakdowns and accidents. Safe vehicle transport anytime.

Professional car maintenance and oil change at your location — no garage needed.

System Diagnosis & Repairs

Expert mobile mechanic for minor repairs, electrical fixes, and full diagnostics.

AC Gas Refill

On-demand AC gas refill service. Stay cool with fast, efficient car AC servicing.

Towing & Recovery

Reliable car towing for breakdowns and accidents. Safe vehicle transport anytime.

Why Choose Us

Why We're the Preferred
Roadside Assistance in UAE

24/7 Availability

Always ready to help—day or night, weekends and public holidays. No waiting, no delays.

Fast Response Time

Our technicians are strategically positioned to reach you in under 30 minutes.

Expert Technicians

Skilled, certified mechanics with over 10 years of combined field experience.

Wide UAE Coverage

Serving Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and Ajman—wherever you are, we come to you.

Reliable & Trusted

Over 10,000 happy customers trust us for dependable, professional roadside care.
